1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class identifiers in lookup table

3.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by the high risk class identifier

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Trondheim extent by intersecting municipality geometry and filtered quick-clay polygons

5.description: get buildings in Trondheim with their representative point geometry

6.description: find buildings that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

8.description: collapse multiple matches per building using minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by ascending distance to centroid

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%' LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = (
  SELECT identifier FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY (identifier::int) DESC LIMIT 1
);

1.sql: SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%' LIMIT 1;

5.sql: SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt, bygningid FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';
